required_aggregates_unresolvable_without.audited_child_sessions: Stage-1 RCA methodology (sampled audit of 200); not a DB-derived count. parent_id IS NOT NULL = 843, task-child title pattern = 843; neither yields 200.
required_aggregates_unresolvable_without.children_over_150k: Requires live context-window size; session.tokens_* are cumulative lifetime totals (cumulative>150000 = 571 children, not 22). Live size needs message/part `data` content.
required_aggregates_unresolvable_without.child_compress_calls: Compress tool calls are stored only in part/message `data` (content) columns; no metadata count exists.

status: BLOCKED - required aggregates need content columns (forbidden by no-content rule)
